name: Pilot Travel Center #4

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Avon
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Pilot Travel Center at I-90 Exit 151 in Avon.

name: Speedway - Avon (Exit 151)

name: Sylvester Truck & Tire Service
description: Full-service commercial truck tire and repair shop along I-90 in Avon, serving local and out-of-town fleets plus light-truck/auto tire and repair.

name: Pilot Travel Center #2
description: 24-hour Pilot travel center at I-90 Exit 223 (SR-45) with diesel, 9 fuel lanes, about 150 truck spaces, 7 showers, a CAT Scale, Subway, Dunkin and laundry.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Austinburg
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Pilot Travel Center at I-90 Exit 223 in Austinburg.

name: Flying J Travel Plaza #694
description: 24-hour Flying J at I-90 Exit 223 with diesel, 12 fuel lanes, about 164 truck spaces, 15 showers, a CAT Scale, Denny's, laundry, DEF and RV lanes.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J Austinburg
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Flying J Travel Plaza at I-90 Exit 223 in Austinburg.

name: Speedco #903 - Austinburg
description: Speedco (Love's) truck lube and tire center at I-90 Exit 223 with commercial truck tires, light mechanical, oil changes and emergency roadside assistance.

name: TA Kingsville #029
description: 24-hour TravelCenters of America at I-90 Exit 235 with BP diesel, 8 fuel lanes, about 158 truck spaces, 9 showers, a CAT Scale, TA Truck Service and laundry.

name: CAT Scale at TA Kingsville
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at TA Kingsville at I-90 Exit 235.

name: TA Truck Service - Kingsville
description: On-site heavy-duty truck repair shop at TA Kingsville, I-90 Exit 235, offering mechanical repair and roadside service for commercial trucks.

name: Love's Travel Stop #389
description: 24-hour Love's at I-90 Exit 241 with diesel, 8 DEF lanes, about 80 truck spaces, 7 showers, a CAT Scale, McDonald's, Subway and a co-located Speedco.

description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #389 at I-90 Exit 241 in Conneaut.

name: Kwik Fill Truck Stop #227
description: Kwik Fill truck stop at I-90 Exit 218 in Geneva with 24-hour diesel, about 50 truck spaces, showers, certified scales, DEF and a convenience store.

description: Full-service truck and trailer wash just off I-90 Exit 218 in Geneva (est. 1988), with truck/trailer/engine wash plus tires, oil changes and minor repairs.

name: Ashtabula County I-90 Westbound Welcome Center / Rest Area
description: ODOT I-90 westbound welcome center/rest area near milepost 242 in Conneaut, between the PA line and SR-7; opened 2024 with 41 pull-through truck parking spaces and restrooms.

name: Conneaut Weigh Station (I-90 WB)
description: Ohio commercial vehicle weigh/inspection station on I-90 westbound near milepost 242.5 in Conneaut, close to the Pennsylvania state line; supports PrePass with OSHP inspections.

name: Red Roof Inn Ashtabula - Austinburg
description: Budget motel just off I-90 Exit 223 advertising free RV/bus/truck parking (accommodates up to about 15 trucks), free Wi-Fi and guest laundry.

name: Roc's TNT Emergency Roadside Service - Ashtabula
description: 24/7 mobile commercial truck and trailer roadside service covering the I-90 Ashtabula area — tire changes, electrical and trailer repairs, towing.
